channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: Transmigrated Into an Ancient Famine Novel as a Scumbag Alpha (ABO, GL) — Chapter 166
item.description: Chapter 166 Time passed quickly. In the blink of an eye, Jiang Jinhuang reached the time to give birth. In the morning, Jiang Jinhuang discussed official gazette matters with her female officials, showing no signs of labor. In the afternoon, she suddenly went into labor. Someone called Ye Qing from the office. She anxiously waited…

item.title: Dressed as the Scumbag Alpha Mom of the Tragic Female Lead (ABO, GL) — Chapter 163
item.description: Chapter 163 After binding Du Wanjun, Liu Xinran was drenched in sweat. Zhuang Jingyuan remained unconscious, her facial wounds crudely treated. Of course, Liu Xinran’s care wasn’t out of kindness but fear that her death would prevent him from saving his sister. Though driven by impulse, he had no regrets or time for them. He…

item.title: After the Top Idol Omega and I Started Living Together — Chapter 129
item.description: Chapter 129 The heels quickly tapped on the ground, creating a strong contrast with Jingyun’s singing. The guests walking ahead couldn’t help but notice the sound, but before they saw what happened, the just-closed door got pushed open again. The cold wind of the winter night suddenly rushed in, and the temperature difference messed up…

item.title: Accidentally Marked My Ex’s Crush, the Ice-Cold Goddess O — Chapter 128 The One Who Feels The Pain Is Her
item.description: Chapter 128: The One Who Feels the Pain Is Her “Hmm, Friday,” Gu Feiran repeated. Jiang Ci recalled the time she deceived Dr. Gu. This time, she didn’t dare hide anything but only told half the truth: “This Friday, I’m attending a banquet. It was just confirmed today.” Gu Feiran handed her the phone: “Then…
